item.title: The UK regions with the highest proportion of homes above the inheritance tax threshold
item.description: High house prices are pushing more families into the inheritance tax trap across the country

item.title: Pensioners ‘running down larger pots’ to avoid inheritance tax as rule change looms

item.title: Why do experts think emerging markets will outperform?
item.description: Emerging markets were one of the top-performing themes of 2025, but they could have further to run as global investors diversify
